title: Coordinates, Graphs, Functions, and Rates of Change · Worked Case: Coordinate Plane
summary: Model water use, travel, cost, and capacity from tables, graphs, formulas, and descriptions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg coordinate plane increment in a multi-representation resource dashboard. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Plot and interpret ordered pairs with axis quantities, units, origin, and scale.
Identify misleading scales, omitted groups, confounding, and correlation-causation errors.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
